content.text:
Implemented the fix in `src/flb_parser.c`.

Summary:
- Root cause: for time-only formats (no year/date), `flb_parser_time_lookup()` always used `gmtime_r()` to derive the default “today” date, even when `Time_System_Timezone on` means the timestamp will later be interpreted with `mktime()` in the local timezone. Around local midnight in UTC+ zones, UTC may still be on the previous day, so the parser injected the wrong date.
- Fix: when `parser->time_system_timezone` is enabled, derive the default date using `localtime_r()` instead of `gmtime_r()`. Otherwise, keep the previous UTC behavior.
